message:
test(math_abi): add ABI tests for lgamma_r, nexttoward, and __fp* internals [bd-2vv.4]

Add 12 new ABI-level tests covering the functions added in recent batches:
- lgamma_r: positive sign, negative sign, null signgamp, pole errno
- lgammaf_r: positive sign and value
- nexttoward/nexttowardf: step direction and NaN propagation
- __fpclassify/__fpclassifyf: all 5 categories
- __signbit/__signbitf: sign detection
- __isinf/__isnan/__finite + f32 variants: classification checks

Math ABI test count: 97 → 109 (all pass).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
